lessons.observation: Static keyword-to-tool maps are a bottleneck for autonomous sub-agents as the MCP ecosystem grows.
lessons.recommendation: Use a central discovery MCP server to aggregate tool manifests and perform semantic search on descriptions.

lessons.observation: Network-based discovery can fail if the discovery server or target MCP servers are offline.
lessons.recommendation: Implement a fallback mechanism (like the existing static keyword map) to ensure basic functionality remains available.

lessons.observation: SADD sub-agents benefit from knowing which tools are available *before* they start a workstream.
lessons.recommendation: Inject semantic tool context into sub-agent runners using the MCPToolBridge to guide tool selection.
